summary: Dark, color-graded footage touring a CBP drug 'vault': a CBP officer walks a dim warehouse aisle stacked with boxes and gloved hands handle seized narcotics packages sealed with red evidence tape, bookended by the CBP seal on a textured background. The tweet makes a jokey #Fallout reference, but the clip itself is moody operational B-roll with no music, narration, or audio track. As silent B-roll with no song or genre treatment, it is out of scope.
notable_text: U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION / DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY (seal); CBP FEDERAL OFFICER (uniform)
